title: Sukkur IBA Phase II mock test #6 results published
body: Merit list and sectional breakdown are live on the results portal. Toppers batch photo will be posted Friday.

title: New MDCAT Biology chapter tests added
body: Chapters 9-12 (Support & Movement, Coordination) chapter-wise tests are now open for practice.

title: Aror University entry test guidance session
body: Free orientation session on Aror University's admission test pattern and eligibility, Sukkur campus, Saturday 4 PM.

title: Batch 2026-B admissions open
body: Evening batch for Sukkur IBA Phase II preparation starts August 1st. Seats limited to 40.

title: Mathematics Complete Preparation Guide 2026 released
body: Full-length guide covering the Sukkur IBA quantitative section is now available at the front desk and online.

title: Mock Test #5 schedule
body: Sunday 10 AM, both morning and evening batches. Bring your admit slip.

title: MDCAT external resources page live
body: Direct links to PMC's official MDCAT syllabus and past papers added to the Programs section.

title: Website launched
body: Indus Academy & Testing Services is now online. Certificate verification, blog, and mock results all in one place.
